title: Kes Woodward’s new television program grew from an unexpected place – a five-minute promotional video for KUAC TV!
summary: The Fairbanks artist is at the center of a new locally produced program that began airing on KUAC TV on Sept. 22. “Into the Woods,” featuring Woodward, is an eight-week journey into the meaning of art, with Woodward sharing the path of the artist with three total art novices. This master class focused less on talent, natural abilities and building skill, and more on the inner journey of the artist. The idea came about as a re...

title: Survey Error Buildup is Topic of 27th Annual Morris Hansen Lecture
summary: Can survey errors feed off each other? If so, how can those error bias be reduced, if at all? Roger Tourangeau, Vice President and Associate Director of Westat, will examine two examples of error cumulation in the 27th Annual Morris Hansen Lecture.
